title: The Depths of Impel Down: Turning Point
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #10, Ivankov as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Uwoooh!!! My strength is over- flowing!!

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: That's...!! IVANKov! He should be dead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Move it!!! Don't get in my way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The Revolution- Today from South Blue, Inazuma!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Activate the traps in the passage immediately.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: The Vice Warden is serious here!!
